test_inputs.context: 用户想找美国市场的潜在客户

evals.name: has_clear_structure
evals.question: Is the output organized with clear sections, bullet points, or numbered lists?
evals.pass_description: Output has clear structure with headers/bullets/lists
evals.fail_description: Output is unstructured wall of text

evals.name: provides_actionable_steps
evals.question: Does the output provide clear, actionable steps the user can follow immediately?
evals.pass_description: Output includes specific, immediately actionable steps with clear next actions
evals.fail_description: Output is vague or lacks actionable guidance

evals.name: professional_tone
evals.question: Is the tone professional and business-appropriate?
evals.pass_description: Tone is professional and suitable for B2B sales
evals.fail_description: Tone is too casual, unprofessional, or robotic

evals.name: no_emoji_overuse
evals.description: No more than 3 emojis in output

evals.name: has_followup_strategy
evals.question: Does the output include a follow-up strategy or timeline?
evals.pass_description: Output includes specific follow-up strategy with timeline

evals.name: provides_examples
evals.question: Does the output provide concrete examples or use cases?
evals.pass_description: Output includes specific examples or use cases
